args.query: site:ebay.com/help refund after seller receives return refund credited original payment method 3-5 business days

content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Return an item for a refund

  - url: https://www.ebay.com/help/buying/returns-refunds/returning-item?id=4041

  - source: eBay

  - domain: ebay.com


  ## Content


  # Return an item for a refund


  A buyer can request a return when an item is not as expected or when the seller''s
  stated return policy allows a change-of-mind return. The request is opened from
  the purchase record in My eBay. After a request is opened, the seller normally has
  three business days to respond.


  The return request remains the place where the buyer can see the seller''s response,
  the instructions for sending the item back, and the progress of the return. When
  the seller accepts the request, eBay sends the next-step instructions. Depending
  on the return reason and the seller''s policy, the seller or the buyer may be responsible
  for return shipping.


  ## Sending the item back


  The buyer should send the item by the date shown in the return instructions. When
  the buyer purchases the shipping label, a tracked service should be used and the
  tracking number should be added to the existing return request. If an eBay return
  label is used, tracking details are added to the request automatically.


  The return should be packed carefully and sent in the same condition in which it
  was received. A seller may be allowed to deduct from the refund when an item is
  returned used, damaged, missing parts, or damaged because it was not packaged correctly.


  Once the return reaches the seller, the return moves to the refund stage. Most sellers
  issue the refund after receiving the item. The buyer can continue checking the existing
  return details to see the request progress and the refund deadline.


  ## If the seller has not issued the refund


  If tracking shows that the item was returned to the seller but the seller has not
  issued the refund by the applicable deadline, the buyer may be able to ask eBay
  to step in. The buyer should use the existing return details rather than starting
  another return for the same transaction.


  To ask eBay for help from an eligible return:


  1. Open Purchases.

  2. Find the item and select **See return details**.

  3. Select **Ask eBay to step in and help**.

  4. Choose the reason and confirm.


  eBay reviews the existing case information and normally responds after reviewing
  the details supplied by the buyer and seller.


  ## Closing an existing request


  A buyer who no longer wants to return the item can close the existing request from
  the request details. A closed return request cannot be reopened, and a new return
  request cannot be submitted for the same transaction. Closing should therefore be
  used only when the issue is resolved or the buyer no longer wants to continue the
  return.


  The return request, its shipment information, delivery progress, seller receipt,
  and refund handling are consecutive parts of one after-sales process. The status
  shown in the existing request should be checked before attempting to start a separate
  return or case.

  '

title: Return an item for a refund
url: https://www.ebay.com/help/buying/returns-refunds/returning-item?id=4041

Here’s the current status for order **EB-604182**:

- **Return request:** Open and correctly linked to the USB‑C Docking Station — **RET-604182-1**
- **Return shipment:** Delivered to the seller on **July 8, 2026 at 6:40 PM UTC**
- **Refund:** **$189.99 USD was issued on July 9, 2026 at 9:20 AM UTC**
- **Payment settlement:** Still **pending** on your credit card; no settlement date has been recorded yet.
- The general order summary is stale—it still says “waiting for return”—but the more recent return-resolution event confirms receipt and refund issuance.

### What to do next

1. Open **Purchase history → See return details** for this order and confirm that the refund is shown as issued.
2. Allow the pending refund to complete through your credit-card provider. The money may not appear in your card account until settlement is finished.
3. If it remains missing after your card issuer’s normal refund-processing timeframe, contact the card issuer and provide:
   - Refund ID: **RF-604182-01**
   - Amount: **$189.99**
   - Issued: **July 9, 2026**
4. If eBay’s return page does not show the issued refund or the settlement remains pending unusually long, use the existing return request to contact eBay—**do not open a second return for the same order**. eBay’s guidance says to use **“Ask eBay to step in and help”** from the existing return details when appropriate: [eBay return guidance](https://www.ebay.com/help/buying/returns-refunds/returning-item?id=4041).
